visual_description: In a dimly lit room with blinds, a man with spiky hair wearing a dark jacket over a patterned shirt and a necklace looks downward while a suited man stands partially visible beside him; the view then shifts to a man in a denim jacket seen through vertical bars, standing in a hallway and looking around.
